Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Class JsonFileConfigProvider

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Runtime.dll

An IConfigProvider that reads configuration from a local JSON file. Supports refresh to reload the file. Thread-safe.

public sealed class JsonFileConfigProvider : IConfigProvider
Inheritance
object
JsonFileConfigProvider
Implements
IConfigProvider

Constructors

JsonFileConfigProvider(string)

Creates a provider that reads from the specified file path.

public JsonFileConfigProvider(string filePath)

Parameters

filePath string

Absolute or relative path to the JSON config file.

Exceptions

FileNotFoundException

Thrown when the file does not exist.

Methods

GetSectionAsync(string, CancellationToken)

Gets a section (nested object) as key-value pairs, or null if the key is missing or not an object.

public Task<IReadOnlyDictionary<string, string>?> GetSectionAsync(string key, CancellationToken ct = default)

Parameters

key string
ct CancellationToken

Returns

Task<IReadOnlyDictionary<string, string>>

GetValueAsync(string, CancellationToken)

Gets a raw string value for the given key, or null if missing.

key string
ct CancellationToken

Returns

Gets and deserializes a value for the given key, or null if missing.

Returns true if the feature is enabled (truthy value in config).
